name: stepai3d
description: Landing page for the StepAI3D workshop with 3D preview and contact form.

scripts.build: rm -rf _site && mkdir -p _site/assets/content _site/assets/styles _site/assets/scripts && cp index.html robots.txt sitemap.xml media-contact-sheet.jpg consent.html privacy-policy.html terms.html _site/ && cp assets/VK.jpg assets/teacher-kristina.jpg _site/assets/ && cp assets/gallery-scan.jpg assets/gallery-statues.jpg assets/gallery-chess.jpg assets/gallery-workshop.jpg assets/gallery-large-print.jpg assets/gallery-model.jpg _site/assets/ && cp -r assets/Meshy_AI_11111_0501073610_texture_fbx _site/assets/ && cp -r assets/vendor _site/assets/ && cp assets/content/site-config.json _site/assets/content/ && cp -r assets/styles _site/assets/ && cp -r assets/scripts _site/assets/
